create_sql:
CREATE VIEW v_units_snapshot AS
WITH unit_anchor AS (
    SELECT 'current' AS phase, 'b' AS side, MAX(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'b'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'initial' AS phase, 'b' AS side, MIN(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'b'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'current' AS phase, 'op' AS side, MAX(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'op'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'initial' AS phase, 'op' AS side, MIN(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'op'
)
SELECT
    a.phase,
    u.snapshotid,
    u.datetime AS ref_datetime,
    u.side,
    u.unitname,
    u.groupname,
    u.unittype,
    u.posx,
    u.posy,
    u.posz,
    u.damage,
    u.objectparent
FROM units u
JOIN unit_anchor a
  ON u.side = a.side
 AND u.datetime = a.ref_datetime

CREATE VIEW v_units_snapshot_count AS
SELECT
    phase,
    side,
    ref_datetime,
    COUNT(*) AS unit_count
FROM v_units_snapshot
GROUP BY
    phase,
    side,
    ref_datetime

CREATE VIEW v_vehicles_snapshot AS
WITH vehicle_anchor AS (
    SELECT 'current' AS phase, 'b' AS side, MAX(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM vehicles
    WHERE side = 'b'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'initial' AS phase, 'b' AS side, MIN(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM vehicles
    WHERE side = 'b'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'current' AS phase, 'op' AS side, MAX(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM vehicles
    WHERE side = 'op'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'initial' AS phase, 'op' AS side, MIN(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM vehicles
    WHERE side = 'op'
)
SELECT
    a.phase,
    v.snapshotid,
    v.datetime AS ref_datetime,
    v.side,
    v.vehiclename,
    v.groupname,
    v.vehicletype,
    v.posx,
    v.posy,
    v.posz,
    v.damage,
    v.hitpointjson
FROM vehicles v
JOIN vehicle_anchor a
  ON v.side = a.side
 AND v.datetime = a.ref_datetime

CREATE VIEW v_vehicles_snapshot_count AS
SELECT
    phase,
    side,
    ref_datetime,
    COUNT(*) AS vehicle_count
FROM v_vehicles_snapshot
GROUP BY
    phase,
    side,
    ref_datetime

note: 현재 아군 그룹과 적군 그룹 간 거리
create_sql:
CREATE VIEW v_current_friendly_enemy_group_distance AS
WITH
anchor AS (
    SELECT MAX(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM snapshots
    WHERE datetime IS NOT NULL
),
friendly_group_centroid AS (
    SELECT
        u.groupname,
        u.datetime,
        AVG(u.posx) AS centroid_posx,
        AVG(u.posy) AS centroid_posy,
        AVG(u.posz) AS centroid_posz
    FROM units u
    WHERE u.side = 'b'
    GROUP BY u.groupname, u.datetime
),
enemy_group_centroid AS (
    SELECT
        u.groupname,
        u.datetime,
        AVG(u.posx) AS centroid_posx,
        AVG(u.posy) AS centroid_posy,
        AVG(u.posz) AS centroid_posz
    FROM units u
    WHERE u.side = 'op'
    GROUP BY u.groupname, u.datetime
),
friendly_current AS (
    SELECT
        fg.groupname,
        fg.datetime,
        fg.centroid_posx,
        fg.centroid_posy,
        fg.centroid_posz,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY fg.groupname
            ORDER BY ABS(julianday(fg.datetime) - julianday(a.ref_datetime)), fg.datetime DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM friendly_group_centroid fg
    CROSS JOIN anchor a
),
enemy_current AS (
    SELECT
        eg.groupname,
        eg.datetime,
        eg.centroid_posx,
        eg.centroid_posy,
        eg.centroid_posz,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY eg.groupname
            ORDER BY ABS(julianday(eg.datetime) - julianday(a.ref_datetime)), eg.datetime DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM enemy_group_centroid eg
    CROSS JOIN anchor a
)
SELECT
    a.ref_datetime,
    f.groupname AS friendly_groupname,
    f.datetime AS friendly_datetime,
    f.centroid_posx AS friendly_posx,
    f.centroid_posy AS friendly_posy,
    f.centroid_posz AS friendly_posz,
    e.groupname AS enemy_groupname,
    e.datetime AS enemy_datetime,
    e.centroid_posx AS enemy_posx,
    e.centroid_posy AS enemy_posy,
    e.centroid_posz AS enemy_posz,
    sqrt(
        (f.centroid_posx - e.centroid_posx) * (f.centroid_posx - e.centroid_posx) +
        (f.centroid_posy - e.centroid_posy) * (f.centroid_posy - e.centroid_posy) +
        (COALESCE(f.centroid_posz, 0.0) - COALESCE(e.centroid_posz, 0.0)) *
        (COALESCE(f.centroid_posz, 0.0) - COALESCE(e.centroid_posz, 0.0))
    ) AS distance_3d
FROM anchor a
JOIN friendly_current f ON f.rn = 1
JOIN enemy_current e ON e.rn = 1
ORDER BY distance_3d ASC, friendly_groupname, enemy_groupname

    e.datetime AS enemy_datetime,

        (f.posx - e.posx) * (f.posx - e.posx) +
        (f.posy - e.posy) * (f.posy - e.posy) +
        (COALESCE(f.posz, 0.0) - COALESCE(e.posz, 0.0)) *
        (COALESCE(f.posz, 0.0) - COALESCE(e.posz, 0.0))
    ) AS distance_3d
FROM anchor a
JOIN friendly_current f ON f.rn = 1
JOIN enemy_current e ON e.rn = 1
ORDER BY distance_3d ASC, friendly_unitname, enemy_unitname

ORDER BY distance_3d ASC, friendly_vehiclename, enemy_vehiclename

note: 아군 유닛 속도 변화 추이 (최신 시간대부터)
create_sql:
CREATE VIEW v_friendly_unit_speed_trend AS
WITH movement AS (
    SELECT
        unitname,
        groupname,
        unittype,
        datetime,
        posx,
        posy,
        posz,
        LAG(datetime) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS prev_datetime,
        LAG(posx) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS prev_posx,
        LAG(posy) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS prev_posy,
        LAG(posz) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS prev_posz
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'b'
),
speed_base AS (
    SELECT
        unitname,
        groupname,
        unittype,
        datetime,
        prev_datetime,
        posx,
        posy,
        posz,
        prev_posx,
        prev_posy,
        prev_posz,
        (julianday(datetime) - julianday(prev_datetime)) * 86400.0 AS dt_seconds,
        sqrt(
            (posx - prev_posx) * (posx - prev_posx) +
            (posy - prev_posy) * (posy - prev_posy) +
            (COALESCE(posz, 0.0) - COALESCE(prev_posz, 0.0)) *
            (COALESCE(posz, 0.0) - COALESCE(prev_posz, 0.0))
        ) AS distance_delta
    FROM movement
    WHERE prev_datetime IS NOT NULL
),
speed_calc AS (
    SELECT
        unitname,
        groupname,
        unittype,
        datetime,
        prev_datetime,
        dt_seconds,
        distance_delta,
        CASE
            WHEN dt_seconds IS NULL OR ABS(dt_seconds) < 1e-9 THEN NULL
            ELSE distance_delta / dt_seconds
        END AS speed_per_sec
    FROM speed_base
)
SELECT
    unitname,
    groupname,
    unittype,
    datetime,
    prev_datetime,
    dt_seconds,
    distance_delta,
    speed_per_sec,
    LAG(speed_per_sec) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS prev_speed_per_sec,
    speed_per_sec - LAG(speed_per_sec) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS speed_change_per_sec
FROM speed_calc
ORDER BY datetime DESC, unitname

note: 아군 유닛별 탄약량 변화 추이 (최신 시간대부터)
create_sql:
CREATE VIEW v_friendly_unit_ammo_trend AS
WITH ammo_total AS (
    SELECT
        unitname,
        datetime,
        SUM(COALESCE(count, 0)) AS total_ammo_count
    FROM units_ammo
    WHERE side = 'b'
    GROUP BY unitname, datetime
),
ammo_delta AS (
    SELECT
        unitname,
        datetime,
        total_ammo_count,
        LAG(datetime) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS prev_datetime,
        LAG(total_ammo_count) OVER (PARTITION BY unitname ORDER BY datetime) AS prev_total_ammo_count
    FROM ammo_total
)
SELECT
    unitname,
    datetime,
    prev_datetime,
    total_ammo_count,
    prev_total_ammo_count,
    total_ammo_count - prev_total_ammo_count AS ammo_change
FROM ammo_delta
ORDER BY datetime DESC, unitname
